title: Hanuman Chalisa
intro: Read the powerful Shri Hanuman Chalisa to remove obstacles and seek divine blessings
description:
॥ Jai Shri Ram ॥

॥ Shri Hanuman Chalisa ॥

॥ Doha ॥
Shri Guru Charan Saroj Raj, Nij Manu Mukuru Sudhar .
Barnau Raghuvar Vimal Jasu, Jo Dayaku Phal Char .||
Buddhiheen Tanu Janike, Sumiro Pavan Kumar.
Bal Buddhi Vidya Dehu Mohi, Harahu Kalesh Vikar.||

॥ Chaupai ॥
Jai Hanuman Gyan Gun Sagar.
Jai Kapees Tihu Lok Ujagar.||
Ram Doot Atulit Bal Dhama.
Anjani-Putra Pavan Sut Nama.||
Mahaveer Vikram Bajrangi.
Kumati Nivar Sumati Ke Sangi.||
Kanchan Varan Viraj Subesa.
Kanan Kundal Kunchit Kesa.||4||

Haath Vajra Au Dhvaja Virajai.
Kaandhe Moonj Janeoo Sajai.||
Shankar Suvan Kesari Nandan.
Tej Pratap Maha Jag Vandan.||
Vidyavaan Guni Ati Chatur.
Ram Kaj Karibe Ko Aatur.||
Prabhu Charitra Sunibe Ko Rasiya.
Ram Lakhan Sita Man Basiya.||8||

Sukshma Roop Dhari Siyahi Dikhava.
Vikat Roop Dhari Lank Jarava.||
Bheem Roop Dhari Asur Sanhare.
Ramchandra Ke Kaj Sanvare.||
Laay Sajivan Lakhan Jiyaye.
Shri Raghubeer Harashi Ur Laye.||
Raghupati Keenhi Bahut Badai.
Tum Mam Priya Bharat Sam Bhai.||12||

Sahas Badan Tumharo Jas Gavein.
As Kahi Shripati Kanth Lagavein.||
Sankadik Brahmadi Munisa.
Narad Sarad Sahit Ahisa.||
Jam Kuber Digpal Jahan Te.
Kavi Kobid Kahi Sake Kahan Te.||
Tum Upkar Sugrivahi Keenha.
Ram Milay Raj Pad Deenha.||16||

Tumharo Mantra Vibhishan Mana.
Lankeshwar Bhaye Sab Jag Jana.||
Jug Sahastra Jojan Par Bhanu.
Leelyo Tahi Madhur Phal Janu.||
Prabhu Mudrika Meli Mukh Maahi.
Jaladhi Langhi Gaye Acharaj Naahi.||
Durgam Kaj Jagat Ke Jete.
Sugam Anugrah Tumhare Tete.||20||

Ram Duare Tum Rakhvare.
Hot Na Aagya Binu Paisare.||
Sab Sukh Lahai Tumhari Sarna.
Tum Rakshak Kahu Ko Darna.||
Aapan Tej Samharo Aapai.
Teeno Lok Haank Te Kanpai.||
Bhoot Pisach Nikat Nahi Aavai.
Mahaveer Jab Naam Sunavai.||24||

Nasai Rog Harai Sab Peera.
Japat Nirantar Hanumat Beera.||
Sankat Te Hanuman Chhudavai.
Man Kram Vachan Dhyan Jo Lavai.||
Sab Par Ram Tapasvee Raja.
Tin Ke Kaj Sakal Tum Saja.||
Aur Manorath Jo Koi Lavai.
Soi Amit Jeevan Phal Pavai.||28||

Charo Jug Partap Tumhara.
Hai Parasiddh Jagat Ujiyara.||
Sadhu Sant Ke Tum Rakhvare.
Asur Nikandan Ram Dulare.||
Asht Siddhi Nau Nidhi Ke Data.
As Bar Deen Janaki Mata.||
Ram Rasayan Tumhare Pasa.
Sada Raho Raghupati Ke Dasa.||32||

Tumhare Bhajan Ram Ko Pavai.
Janam Janam Ke Dukh Bisravai.||
Ant Kaal Raghubar Pur Jaai.
Jahan Janam Hari Bhakt Kahai.||
Aur Devta Chitt Na Dharai.
Hanumat Sei Sarb Sukh Karai.||
Sankat Kataii Mitai Sab Peera.
Jo Sumirai Hanumat Balbeera.||36||

Jai Jai Jai Hanuman Gosain.
Kripa Karahu Guru Dev Ki Naain.||
Jo Sat Bar Path Kar Koi.
Chhootahi Bandi Mahasukh Hoi.||
Jo Yeh Padhai Hanuman Chalisa.
Hoy Siddhi Sakhi Gaurisa.||
Tulsidas Sada Hari Chera.
Keejai Nath Hriday Mahn Dera.||40||

॥ Doha ॥
Pavan Tanay Sankat Haran, Mangal Moorti Roop.
Ram Lakhan Sita Sahit, Hriday Basahu Sur Bhoop.||

Siyavar Ramchandra Ki Jai.
Pavan Sut Hanuman Ki Jai.
Umapati Mahadev Ki Jai.
Shri Ram Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram.
Shri Ram Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram.
meaning:
॥ Jai Shri Ram ॥

॥ Shri Hanuman Chalisa with English Meaning ॥

॥ Doha ॥
Shri Guru Charan Saroj Raj, Nij Manu Mukuru Sudhari.
Meaning: Cleansing the mirror of my mind with the dust of the Guru's lotus feet,

Barnau Raghuvar Vimal Jasu, Jo Dayaku Phal Chari.||
Meaning: I describe the untarnished glory of Shri Ram, which bestows the four fruits of life.

Buddhiheen Tanu Janike, Sumiro Pavan Kumar.
Meaning: Knowing that I am devoid of intelligence, I remember the Son of the Wind.

Bal Buddhi Vidya Dehu Mohi, Harahu Kalesh Vikar.||
Meaning: Grant me strength, intelligence, and knowledge, and remove my sufferings and impurities.

॥ Chaupai ॥
Jai Hanuman Gyan Gun Sagar. Jai Kapees Tihu Lok Ujagar.||
Meaning: Victory to Hanuman, the ocean of knowledge and virtues. Victory to the Lord of the monkeys, who enlightens all three worlds.

Ram Doot Atulit Bal Dhama. Anjani Putra Pavan Sut Nama.||
Meaning: You are the messenger of Lord Rama, the abode of incomparable strength, known as the Son of Anjani and the Wind God.

Mahavir Vikram Bajrangi. Kumati Nivar Sumati Ke Sangi.||
Meaning: You are a great warrior, powerful and brave. You remove evil thoughts and dwell with the wise.

Kanchan Varan Viraj Subesa. Kanan Kundal Kunchit Kesa.||4||
Meaning: You have a golden complexion and are attractively dressed, with earrings and curly hair.

Haath Vajra Au Dhvaja Virajai. Kaandhe Moonj Janeoo Sajai.||
Meaning: You hold the thunderbolt weapon and the banner, and the sacred thread adorns your shoulder.

Shankar Suvan Kesari Nandan. Tej Pratap Maha Jag Vandan.||
Meaning: You are the incarnation of Shiva and the son of Kesari, praised by the entire world for your great glory.

Vidyavaan Guni Ati Chatur. Ram Kaj Karibe Ko Aatur.||
Meaning: You are wise, virtuous, and clever, always eager to serve Lord Rama.

Prabhu Charitra Sunibe Ko Rasiya. Ram Lakhan Sita Man Basiya.||8||
Meaning: You enjoy listening to the stories of the Lord and dwell in the hearts of Rama, Lakshmana, and Sita.

Sukshma Roop Dhari Siyahi Dikhava. Vikat Roop Dhari Lank Jarava.||
Meaning: You appeared before Sita in a tiny form, and in a terrifying form, you burned down Lanka.

Bheem Roop Dhari Asur Sanhare. Ram Chandra Ke Kaj Sanvare.||
Meaning: By taking a massive form, you destroyed the demons and accomplished the tasks of Lord Rama.

Laay Sajivan Lakhan Jiyaye. Shri Raghubeer Harashi Ur Laye.||
Meaning: You brought the Sanjeevani herb and revived Lakshmana, making Lord Rama embrace you with joy.

Raghupati Keenhi Bahut Badai. Tum Mam Priya Bharat Sam Bhai.||12||
Meaning: Rama praised you immensely, saying you are as dear to him as his brother Bharata.

Sahas Badan Tumharo Jas Gavai. As Kahi Shripati Kanth Lagavai.||
Meaning: The thousand-headed serpent sings your glory, and saying this, the Lord embraces you.

Sankadik Brahmadi Munisa. Narad Sarad Sahit Ahisa.||
Meaning: The sages, Brahma, Narada, Saraswati, and Shesha Nag also praise you.

Jam Kuber Digpal Jahan Te. Kavi Kobid Kahi Sake Kahan Te.||
Meaning: Yama, Kubera, and the guardians of the directions cannot fully describe your glory.

Tum Upkar Sugrivahi Keenha. Ram Milay Raj Pad Deenha.||16||
Meaning: You helped Sugriva by introducing him to Rama, granting him the kingdom.

Tumharo Mantra Vibhishan Mana. Lankeshwar Bhaye Sab Jag Jana.||
Meaning: Vibhishana followed your advice and became the Lord of Lanka, which the whole world knows.

Jug Sahastra Jojan Par Bhanu. Leelyo Tahi Madhur Phal Janu.||
Meaning: You jumped to reach the sun, thousands of miles away, thinking it was a sweet fruit.

Prabhu Mudrika Meli Mukh Maahi. Jaladhi Langhi Gaye Acharaj Naahi.||
Meaning: Placing the Lord's ring in your mouth, you crossed the ocean; there is no wonder in this.

Durgam Kaj Jagat Ke Jete. Sugam Anugrah Tumhare Tete.||20||
Meaning: Every difficult task in the world becomes easy with your grace.

Ram Duare Tum Rakhvare. Hot Na Aagya Binu Paisare.||
Meaning: You are the guard at the door of Rama's court; nothing enters without your permission.

Sab Sukh Lahai Tumhari Sarna. Tum Rakshak Kahu Ko Darna.||
Meaning: Those who seek your refuge find all happiness, and with you as their protector, there is no fear.

Aapan Tej Samharo Aapai. Teeno Lok Haank Te Kanpai.||
Meaning: You alone can control your power; when you roar, all three worlds tremble.

Bhoot Pisach Nikat Nahi Aavai. Mahaveer Jab Naam Sunavai.||24||
Meaning: Ghosts and evil spirits do not come near those who invoke the name of the great warrior Hanuman.

Nasai Rog Harai Sab Peera. Japat Nirantar Hanumat Beera.||
Meaning: All diseases and pain are destroyed when one constantly chants the name of Hanuman.

Sankat Te Hanuman Chhudavai. Man Kram Vachan Dhyan Jo Lavai.||
Meaning: Hanuman rescues those who remember him in thought, word, and deed from every difficulty.

Sab Par Ram Tapasvi Raja. Tin Ke Kaj Sakal Tum Saja.||
Meaning: Lord Rama is the ascetic king, and you have accomplished all his tasks.

Aur Manorath Jo Koi Lavai. Soi Amit Jeevan Phal Pavai.||28||
Meaning: Whoever comes to you with any desire receives the eternal fruit of life.

Charo Jug Partap Tumhara. Hai Parasiddh Jagat Ujiyara.||
Meaning: Your glory is famous in all four ages, and your light shines across the world.

Sadhu Sant Ke Tum Rakhvare. Asur Nikandan Ram Dulare.||
Meaning: You are the protector of saints and sages, the destroyer of demons, and beloved of Rama.

Asht Siddhi Nau Nidhi Ke Data. As Var Deen Janaki Mata.||
Meaning: You are the bestower of the eight siddhis and nine nidhis, as granted by Mother Janaki.

Ram Rasayan Tumhare Pasa. Sada Raho Raghupati Ke Dasa.||32||
Meaning: You possess the essence of devotion to Rama; remain always his servant.

Tumhare Bhajan Ram Ko Pavai. Janam Janam Ke Dukh Bisravai.||
Meaning: Through your devotion, one attains Rama and forgets the sorrows of past lives.

Ant Kaal Raghubar Pur Jaai. Jahan Janam Hari Bhakt Kahai.||
Meaning: In the end, one reaches the abode of Rama and is born as a devotee of the Lord.

Aur Devta Chitt Na Dharai. Hanumat Sei Sarb Sukh Karai.||
Meaning: Even without remembering other gods, if one serves Hanuman, one attains all happiness.

Sankat Kataii Mitai Sab Peera. Jo Sumirai Hanumat Balbeera.||36||
Meaning: All troubles end and pain is erased for those who remember the brave Hanuman.

Jai Jai Jai Hanuman Gosai. Kripa Karahu Gurudev Ki Nai.||
Meaning: Victory, victory, victory to Lord Hanuman. Please show mercy like a Guru.

Jo Sat Bar Path Kar Koi. Chhootahi Bandi Mahasukh Hoi.||
Meaning: Whoever recites this a hundred times is released from bondage and attains great happiness.

Jo Yeh Padhai Hanuman Chalisa. Hoy Siddhi Sakhi Gaurisa.||
Meaning: Whoever reads this Hanuman Chalisa attains success; Lord Shiva himself is the witness.

Tulsidas Sada Hari Chera. Keejai Nath Hriday Mahn Dera.||40||
Meaning: Tulsidas is always a servant of the Lord; O Lord, make your home in my heart.

॥ Doha ॥
Pavan Tanay Sankat Haran, Mangal Moorti Roop.
Meaning: O Son of the Wind, you are the destroyer of sorrows and the embodiment of auspiciousness.

Ram Lakhan Sita Sahit, Hriday Basahu Sur Bhoop.||
Meaning: Along with Rama, Lakshmana, and Sita, please reside in my heart, O King of Gods.

Siyavar Ramchandra Ki Jai.
Victory to Siyavar Ramchandra.
Pavan Sut Hanuman Ki Jai.
Victory to Pavan Sut Hanuman.
Umapati Mahadev Ki Jai.
Victory to Umapati Mahadev.
Shri Ram Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram.
Shri Ram Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram.

faq.q1: When should I recite Hanuman Chalisa?
faq.q2: Can it be recited in any language?
faq.a2: Yes, devotion matters more than language.
